name: terraform-state-mover
description: Analyze cross-repository Terraform HCL files, detect hardcoded ARN dependencies, and generate migration plans

scripts.demo:gatekeeper: tsx src/cli.ts analyze examples/gatekeeper/infra-central examples/gatekeeper/service-app-api examples/gatekeeper/service-app-analytics examples/gatekeeper/infra-platform --preset gatekeeper --state-dir examples/gatekeeper/state -o output/gatekeeper
scripts.demo:spaghetti: tsx src/cli.ts analyze examples/spaghetti/network examples/spaghetti/platform examples/spaghetti/services --state-dir examples/spaghetti/state -o output/spaghetti
scripts.demo:env-copypasta: tsx src/cli.ts analyze examples/env-copypasta/prod examples/env-copypasta/stg examples/env-copypasta/dev -o output/env-copypasta
scripts.demo: pnpm demo:gatekeeper && pnpm demo:terralith && pnpm demo:spaghetti && pnpm demo:cross-account && pnpm demo:god-module && pnpm demo:env-copypasta && pnpm demo:count-antipattern && pnpm demo:depends-on-module && echo 'All demos generated in output/'
